input_roles.edit_target_image: Provides all subject identity, composition, camera, scene and narrative facts.

change_scope: exposure, white balance, contrast and color purity
critical_requirements: Preserve skin texture, fabric texture, environmental details and natural light.
No over-smoothing, plastic texture, face drift, background reconstruction or subject redraw.
negative_constraints: do not change identity, face shape, hair, clothing, composition or background narrative
no over-sharpening, fake detail or plastic texture
do not add new objects, text or characters

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Perform natural realistic high-resolution restoration on edit_target_image while preserving all identity, composition, camera, scene and narrative facts. Additional requirements: <user_desc>.
